articles.description: He said that the years 2006-2009 were the most difficult, and the gradual gains made over the years found a resolute push in the past two-years when Home Minister Amit Shah set a deadline of March 31, 2026, to eradicate Left Wing Extremism from the country

articles.title: Despite assurance from Centre, MGNREGS workers denied work
articles.description: From Bihar to Rajasthan, thousands of rural workers say work has been halted; some district officials say they have been directed not to start new works as MGNREGA has been discontinued, though there are no such formal orders

topStories.title: I am the candidate in all 294 seats in Bengal polls: Mamata
topStories.description: The Trinamool Congress chairperson urges the electorate to have faith in her; “forget who is your candidate, I am the candidate everywhere”

topStories.title: No Kings protests draw large crowds to rally against Donald Trump
topStories.description: One of the flagship No Kings rallies happened in Minnesota, where singer Bruce Springsteen performed to crowds.

topStories.title: Drone scare near Air Force One triggers ground stop at Florida's Palm Beach Airport - Report
topStories.description: A ground stop is an air traffic control measure where aircraft are temporarily not allowed to take off from an airport

topStories.title: US Supreme Court set to hear Trump’s bid to end birthright citizenship
topStories.description: At the heart of the case is Executive Order, titled “Protecting the Meaning and Value of American Citizenship.” The order seeks to deny automatic citizenship to children born in the US to undocumented immigrants or parents on temporary visas after February 19, 2025.

topStories.title: Mojtaba's New Message, Days After Trump's 'Don't Know If He's Alive' Claim
topStories.description: Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei has in a written message thanked the people of Iraq for their support in the war against the United States and Israel, Iranian media said on Sunday.

topStories.title: 'Justice For Zubeen Garg In 100 Days': Congress' Poll Promise In Assam
topStories.description: Even as the countdown to the April 9 polls in Assam has begun, the main Opposition Congress on Wednesday released its Assembly election manifesto, announcing five key guarantees.

topStories.title: Uniform Civil Code, Zero Infiltrators: Amit Shah's Big Promise To Assam
topStories.description: The Congress, for its vote bank politics, had changed the entire demographic pattern of Assam. Many districts have turned Muslim-dominated, Amit Shah alleged.

topStories.title: Trump shares letter about ‘only way to Heaven’ as Pope Leo says ‘God doesn't listen to prayers of those who make war'
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump shared a letter from evangelist Franklin Graham discussing faith and the path to Heaven. Graham praised Trump’s leadership in peacemaking and urged conservatives to unite against the Democrat agenda. This follows Graham’s prior endorsement of Trump at CPAC.

topStories.title: Restricting social harm: US verdicts expose social media's design flaws - Business Standard
topStories.description: Restricting social harm: US verdicts expose social media's design flaws  Business Standard

topStories.title: New images show destruction of $300 million USAF E-3 Sentry, struck by Iranian missile in Saudi's Prince Sultan Air Base
topStories.description: Iran's IRGC reportedly destroyed a US AWACS plane, leading to significant military losses. Ukrainian intelligence suggests Russia may have aided Iran by providing satellite imagery. The US has lost numerous military assets, with costs estimated between $1.4 billion and $2.9 billion.

topStories.title: Dubai, Abu Dhabi at risk if UAE enters Iran war, says top US economist Jeffrey Sachs
topStories.description: Sachs highlighted the vulnerability of key cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, speaking to ANI, noting they are designed as global tourism and financial hubs rather than military strongholds.

topStories.title: Vijay follows in the footseteps of Tamil Nadu politicians with a penchant for dual contests
topStories.description: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

dailyNews.description: Speaking in a podcast interview with commentator Benny Johnson, Vance said the administration is examining possible legal avenues. “We think Ilhan Omar definitely committed immigration fraud against the United States of America,” Vance said.

dailyNews.title: Three arrested in Paris after attempted bomb attack outside Bank of America
dailyNews.description: France's anti-terrorism prosecutor's office said it had immediately taken over the investigation.

dailyNews.title: Texas tragedy - Woman visiting cancer-stricken friend killed in ‘carjacking attack,' reveals report
dailyNews.description: The victim — Marietta Allison had travelled from Austin to be with her friend, Cassie Daniel, who was receiving treatment for stage 4 ovarian cancer

dailyNews.title: Middle East War: Ukraine's Zelenskyy accuses Russia of assisting Iran with satellite images, intel of US air base
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, on Saturday (local time), accused Russia of assisting Iran in its war against US by sharing satellite images and intel. Zelenskyy, citing daily intelligence update, said that Moscow shared images of some of the facilities that Tehran has targeted

dailyNews.title: Golden Knights make major coaching shakeup as Stanley Cup Playoffs near
dailyNews.description: The Vegas Golden Knights fired head coach Bruce Cassidy on Sunday and replaced him with John Tortorella with eight games left in the regular season.

dailyNews.title: Michigan routs Tennessee to win regional final, enter NCAA men's Final Four
dailyNews.description: The Michigan Wolverines' 34-10 run helped propel them to a win over the Tennessee Volunteers and advane to the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament Final Four.

dailyNews.title: Cory Booker confronted with old clip of himself saying he loves Donald Trump
dailyNews.description: Sen. Cory Booker was confronted with a 2016 clip saying "I love Donald Trump" during "Meet the Press" on Sunday, and said his Christian faith still guides him to love his enemies.

dailyNews.title: Sleeping 11 minutes longer each night shows surprising health benefit, study finds
dailyNews.description: New research finds that small daily habits, including 11 more minutes of sleep and extra vegetables, are linked to a 10% lower cardiovascular risk.

dailyNews.title: Vacation rental near Yosemite allegedly used to secretly record guests, 4,000 illegal files found
dailyNews.description: A Madera County man faces felony charges after detectives allegedly found over 4,000 child sexual abuse files at a vacation rental near Yosemite.

dailyNews.title: Over 2 dozen children among 33 bodies pulled from Kenyan mass grave: authorities
dailyNews.description: At least 33 bodies, including 25 children, were unearthed from a mass grave in Kericho, Kenya, as authorities investigate a reported hospital morgue transfer.

dailyNews.title: F1 star Max Verstappen suggests he's considering retirement at age 28
dailyNews.description: Red Bull racing star Max Verstappen suggested he was considering retiring from the sport altogether following an eighth place finish at the Japanese Grand Prix.

dailyNews.title: Olena Zelenska warns abducted Ukranian kids may take ‘dozens of years’ to return, praises Melania Trump’s help
dailyNews.description: Olena Zelenska credits Melania Trump's advocacy for spotlighting Ukraine's push to recover thousands of children reportedly taken by Russia since 2022.

dailyNews.description: The war in Iran was a galvanizing force, but plenty of protesters focused on President Trump’s immigration crackdown. Senate candidates in several key races joined the crowds.

dailyNews.title: 2/22/2026: Left Behind; South Africa's Refugees; Is That Art?
dailyNews.description: First, a report from inside the birthplace of food stamps. Then, inside Trump’s South Africa Afrikaner claims. And, the AI art divide: Revolutionary or a gimmick.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Jim Himes accuses Trump of "flat-out lying" about negotiating with Iran
dailyNews.description: Democratic Rep. Jim Himes accused President Trump of lying about U.S. negotiations with Iran on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan."

dailyNews.title: Ex-Surgeon General says social media needs to be regulated "similar to cigarettes"
dailyNews.description: Jerome Adams, who served as surgeon general in President Trump's first term, said that "similar to cigarettes," the government needs to point out that social media platforms "are incredibly addictive."

dailyNews.title: Transcript: Jerome Adams on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: The following is the transcript of the interview with Jerome Adams, surgeon general in the first Trump administration, that aired on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" on March 29, 2026.

dailyNews.title: Rand Paul on being a Republican willing to check the president on various policies
dailyNews.description: Kentucky Sen. Rand Paul addresses President Trump's decision to launch strikes against Iran, the new Department of Homeland Security secretary and the 2028 election.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan prepared to host U.S.-Iran talks in 'coming days' as Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers of Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt all arrived in Islamabad to discuss the evolving regional situation in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

dailyNews.title: Not everyone can expect a bigger tax refund this year — what's actually driving your result
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has said this will be the "largest tax refund season of all time," as a result of his "big beautiful bill." Here's what the megabill means for taxpayers.

dailyNews.title: The problem for investors: We don't know how Trump wants the Iran war to end
dailyNews.description: In his Sunday column for Investing Club subscribers, Jim Cramer argues that the S&P 500 is likely to see further declines during the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.
